name: Zhangjiagang Guangda Special Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhangjiagang Guangda Special Material CO.,LTD. produces and sells steel alloy ingots and forgings. It offers die and tool, alloy structural, railway locomotive, and special alloy steel, as well as wind and nuclear power products. The company also provides machine accessories. Its products are used in civil and military aircraft, armored car, racing, vessel, rail, petrochemical, wind power, power station, mining, machinery, and machinery applications. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China. Zhangjiagang Guangda Special Material CO.,LTD. operates as a subsidiary of Zhangjiagang Guangda Investment Holding Co., Ltd.
